title: Longest Common Substring
description: Given a list of strings, what is the longest substring common to all of them?
input:
The first line of input contains an integer $n$ ($1 \le n \le 1,000$), which is the number of strings that follow.

Each of the next $n$ lines contains a single string $s$ ($1 \le |s| \le 100$) consisting only of lower-case letters.
output: Output a single integer, which is the length of the longest substring common to all of the input strings.
source: , ICPC, Regionals, North America, North America Division Championships, 2021 ICPC North America Division Championships
